results.title: ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: Harmanpreet Kaur Shuts Down Handshake Question Ahead of India Women vs Pakistan Women Clash at Edgbaston
results.description: Ahead of the blockbuster India Women vs Pakistan Women clash at the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026, captain Harmanpreet Kaur firmly dismissed questions over the ongoing handshake policy, insisting her side is focused only on cricket. The Indian skipper downplayed the off-field discussion and reiterated that her team is treating the high-pressure Group A encounter like any other match in its World Cup campaign. The post ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: Harmanpreet Kaur Shuts Down Handshake Question Ahead of India Women vs Pakistan Women Clash at Edgbaston appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: PM Modi’s France Visit: Trump Meeting, Bharat Innovates 2026 And G7 Summit Take Centre Stage
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi begins his visit to France with important engagements, including a meeting with Donald Trump and the launch of Bharat Innovates 2026. The visit included significant talks between French President Emmanuel Macron and him about the G7 Summit.

results.title: Weekly Love Horoscope Predictions, June 14 to June 20, 2026: Your zodiac love forecast for this week
results.description: This week, love emphasizes attention and genuine connection over grand gestures. Whether committed or single, focus on authentic interactions and quiet appreciation. Relationships flourish through shared moments, emotional maturity, and allowing bonds to develop naturally, rather than forcing them.

results.title: Trump Says Iran Agreement Will Be Signed Sunday and Strait of Hormuz Will Reopen

results.title: Man found with stab wounds near Shakarpur flyover in east Delhi, probe under way
results.description: A 26-year-old man was found with multiple stab injuries near a flyover in east Delhi’s Shakarpur area on Sunday, police said. The injured man, identified as Mohit Tiwari, a resident of Ganesh Nagar, was initially admitted to a private hospital before being shifted to the Lok Nayak Jai Prakash Narayan (LNJP) Hospital, they said. results.title: Bhagwant Mann govt to take devotees on free teerath yatra to Salasar Balaji Dham, Sri Khatu Shyam Ji, Haridwar-Rishikesh and Shri Mathura Ji-Vrindavan Dham: Arvind Kejriwal
results.description: Addressing a gathering in the presence of CM Bhagwant Singh Mann, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) National Convenor Arvind Kejriwal said the Punjab Government is not only enabling devotees to undertake sacred pilgrimages free of cost but is also investing in the restoration and development of revered religious sites.
